desc.title: Security compliance documentation for SUSE Linux Enterprise
desc.p: The following documents aim to provide a basic understanding of how SUSE Linux Enterprise Server can be configured to comply with different Security specifications.

SUSE seeks to provide customers with quick and easy guides that can assist them in maintaining security compliance. Before implementing the settings contained within the documents below, make sure to test them in a non-operational environment. The developers of these profiles and documentation have made reasonable efforts to ensure overall compliance. They assume no responsibility for its use by other parties, and make no guarantee, expressed or implied, about its quality, reliability, or any other characteristic.
